title: ActiveCampaign vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign vs Constant Contact. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool wins for your business.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Constant Contact: Feature-by-Feature Comparison
intro: Both ActiveCampaign and Constant Contact are established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels at automation and CRM integration, while Constant Contact prioritizes simplicity and local business features. This guide breaks down their differences to help you choose the right tool.
choose_a_if: You need advanced marketing automation and workflows
CRM functionality is essential for your sales process
You want lead scoring and site tracking capabilities
choose_b_if: You're looking for the lowest entry price point
You need e-commerce integration and social media ads
You prefer a simpler, more intuitive interface

faq.q: Is ActiveCampaign better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is better for businesses requiring advanced automation, CRM, and lead scoring with a G2 rating of 4.5. Constant Contact suits nonprofits and local businesses seeking simplicity and affordability with lower Trustpilot ratings (2.8 vs 4.1).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at $12/month compared to ActiveCampaign's $15/month, making it $3 cheaper per month. However, ActiveCampaign's included CRM and advanced automation may provide better value depending on your requirements.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email data. ActiveCampaign provides import tools to migrate your subscribers and segments, though you'll need to recreate automations and workflows manually for optimal results.
